properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 40/23
 NORWEGIAN SEA.
 1. MILITARY EXERCISE INCLUDING LIVE WEAPONS FIRING IN PROGRESS FROM 240001 UTC APR TO 052359 UTC MAY, WITHIN AREA BETWEEN 60N AND 67N FROM THE NORWEGIAN COAST TO THE ICELANDIC COAST OR 23W.
 2. MARINERS ARE REQUESTED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION, KEEP CLEAR OF ALL NAVAL SHIPS WHICH MAY BE UNLIT AND PAY ATTENTION TO SIGNALS SHOWN.
 3. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 060001 UTC MAY 23.
